title: SANDBAG LOCATIONS - 211info
text: CITY OF CONELIUS SANDBAG LOCATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides sand and sandbags when there is a risk of flooding. Bags are provided on site, and participants must fill them at the self-service station. Sandbag supplies are for emergency use only. 1300 S Kodiak Circle Cornelius, OR 97113 Eligibility: Residential use only Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm (503) 357-3011 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 357-3011 Cornelius Public Works INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Visit website for service hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Cornelius TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: The self- service station is located in the parking lot. Services: Sandbags/Water Diversion Systems If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF CONELIUS
